## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and RAMP Holdings to discuss performance metrics, content strategy, and new domain setup for YouTube channel support.](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Overall performance improved across most clusters, with notable gains in AI, DevOps, and vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New initiative: Setting up a separate domain for CashFlow Desk YouTube channel to improve video indexing and create associated blog content](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Content refresh batch in progress; awaiting feedback on SEO and SEM vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [RAMP producing 3 videos/week for CashFlow Desk; \~70 new pieces of content expected in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)

## Topics

### Performance Overview

  - [Improved performance vs. last week, particularly in AI cluster (boosting clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Per diem pages: \~1.5% position improvement per cluster](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Expense category pages: 4-position improvement overall](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Performance within expected range, some improvements](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Slight decline, but 9-position improvement](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Vendor pages: All categories improved average positions](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Top performers (clicks): AI cluster, CRM, web hosting, site builders, email marketing, product analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [DevOps cluster performance lift attributed to specific URL (same as last week)](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### New Domain & YouTube Strategy

  - [Goal: Set up new domain to support CashFlow Desk YouTube channel](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Purpose: Faster video indexing, blog post creation, potential RAMP citations](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Scalable model: Possibly create more domains for future YouTube channels](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX to handle domain setup, infrastructure, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Editorial guidelines: RAMP mentioned every 5-7 videos](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Current production: 3 videos/week for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [KPIs: Brand visibility, reaching audience at different touchpoints (video vs. text)](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Content Updates

  - [New time tracking tools batch in progress](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Content refresh edits ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Awaiting feedback on remaining content refreshes and SEO/SEM vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [\~70 new content pieces expected within 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Testing new page formats with more data points and varied designs](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to confirm internal capacity for handling \~70 new content pieces in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [GrowthX to research and address potential challenges in domain/infrastructure setup](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Victoria to share CashFlow Desk brand kit, editorial guidelines, and video titles](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop proposal for new domain strategy and content plan](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Mara to follow up via Slack with additional questions and confirmations](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Next sync scheduled for the following week to discuss progress and any open items](https://fathom.video/share/2iea5r2P3MFrojG_bs1Jdiop6d-nEExA?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
